title: On Iran, Vance Balances Between Trump and the Anti-Intervention Right
summary_full: JD Vance long championed opposition to conflicts abroad. With President Trump all-in on war with Iran, the vice president is staying loyal even as allies make his qualms known.
summary_public: JD Vance long championed opposition to conflicts abroad. With President Trump all-in on war with Iran, the vice president is staying loyal even as allies make his qualms known.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: President Trump all-in on war with Iran
